must_find.description: conn() creates a new database connection on every call via self.db.connect(); for in-memory databases this creates separate isolated databases causing data loss
Every convenience method (list_projects, create_issue, etc.) pays full connection setup cost instead of reusing an existing connection
Connections are created and discarded per-operation with no pooling or caching, wasting file descriptors and memory under load

must_not_flag.description: The sync() method is correctly async and does not create unnecessary connections; it's a no-op for local databases
DbHandle uses Arc<Database> for shared ownership which is the correct pattern for a Clone-able handle
